recommendations.title: A Not So Merry Christmas
recommendations.overview: A curse is placed on grinchy Chuy, who wakes up to find he's lived a full year, but is doomed to remember only Christmas Day. Every year. From now on.

recommendations.title: Ants in the Pants 2
recommendations.overview: In the sequel of "Ants in the Pants" we again meet Flo and his friends.

recommendations.title: The Smurfs: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: When Grouchy Smurf behaves badly to everyone and refuses to celebrate Christmas, the Smurfs of Christmas Past, Present and Future teach him to appreciate Christmas.

recommendations.title: Fantasia 2000
recommendations.overview: Blending lively music and brilliant animation, this sequel to the original 'Fantasia' restores 'The Sorcerer's Apprentice' and adds seven new shorts.
recommendations.director: Francis Glebas, Don Hahn, Paul Brizzi, James Algar, Eric Goldberg, Pixote Hunt, Gaëtan Brizzi, Hendel Butoy

recommendations.title: Merry Little Batman
recommendations.overview: This Christmas, Damian Wayne wants to be a superhero like his dad – the one and only Batman. When Damian is left home alone while Batman takes on Gotham’s worst supervillains on Christmas Eve, he stumbles upon a villainous plot to steal Christmas and

recommendations.title: Artificial Paradises
recommendations.overview: Nando and Erika, two young people in their twenties, meet several times without noticing. The story of the subculture of electronic music and rave parties and drugs like MDMA.

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: The 2 Usual Idiots
recommendations.overview: The sequel to 2011 film "I soliti idioti".

recommendations.title: Fear City: A Family-Style Comedy
recommendations.overview: A second-class horror movie has to be shown at Cannes Film Festival, but, before each screening, the projectionist is killed by a mysterious fellow, with hammer and sickle, just as it happens in the film to be shown.

recommendations.title: 2048: Nowhere to Run
recommendations.overview: “2048: Nowhere to Run” takes place one year before the events of Blade Runner 2049. The short film focuses on Sapper, a man who is trying to make it through life day-by-day without turning back to his old ways. We’re introduced to both the gentle nat
